commit.message:
fix: presentation counter tracks generations, not stored presentations (#188)

* feat: add AI Presentation Builder add-on with Stripe billing

New paid add-on for teams — AI-powered slideshow builder using Claude.
Brokers select style/theme/font/color, type slide content, and AI
generates a complete self-contained HTML presentation with team logo.
Includes fullscreen present mode, save/re-generate flow, and
team owner toggle in AI Tools settings.

- New presentations table + RLS (private only)
- New generate-presentation edge function (Claude API, non-streaming)
- New create-addon-checkout edge function (Stripe checkout)
- Updated stripe-webhook for add-on subscription lifecycle
- PresentationsPage with list/create/present views
- Add-on section on BillingPage for team owners
- Presentation Builder toggle in TeamsPage AI Tools settings
- Added to DirectoryPage AI tools grid

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: professional presentation template, keyboard nav, agent CTA

- Complete CSS overhaul: smooth slide transitions, gradient accent bars,
  better typography with proper hierarchy, progress bar
- Larger team logo (300px max) on title slide, injected server-side
- Agent name, email, phone, and license auto-injected as CTA card
  on closing slide from profile.habit_prefs.bio
- Keyboard arrow navigation fixed via postMessage bridge between
  parent window and iframe
- Navigation arrows appear on hover
- Style variants (modern/classic/minimal/bold) properly differentiated
- Deeper color palette with glow values for card backgrounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: modern template redesign, remove Brand theme

Redesign all 4 style presets (Modern, Classic, Minimal, Bold) with
gradient text, backdrop-filter nav, radial gradient title slides,
h2::after underlines, and smoother translateY transitions. Remove
Brand (Gold/Amber) theme option.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: futuristic presentation template overhaul

Complete redesign with staggered content animations (fadeUp per
element), gradient mesh backgrounds on title slides, dot-grid
textures, scale transitions, Google Fonts (Inter, Playfair Display,
JetBrains Mono), gradient border CTA cards, progress bar glow dot,
rounded glass nav buttons, and dramatically differentiated presets:
Modern (mesh gradients + dot grid), Classic (corner accents + dots),
Minimal (ultra-light Swiss design), Bold (full-bleed gradient title).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add agent profile photo to presentation CTA card

Displays the agent's avatar (from profile.goals.avatar_url) in a
round container above their name/contact info on the closing slide.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: hide AI chat widget during presentation mode

Adds onPresentMode callback from PresentationsPage to App.jsx so the
floating AI chat widget is unmounted when viewing a presentation
fullscreen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: custom brand color picker with hex input

Replace fixed color dropdown with preset swatches + native color
wheel + hex text input. Edge function now accepts any #RRGGBB hex
value and auto-derives accent/glow/secondary colors. Backward
compatible with existing preset names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: presentation background images — team upload + slide selector

Team leaders can upload up to 6 background images in AI Tools settings
(stored as data URLs in team_prefs.ai_tools.presentation_backgrounds).
Presentation form shows thumbnails to pick from. Edge function injects
a .bg-overlay div into each slide with the chosen image as a subtle
dimmed cover. Validated server-side against team's allowed backgrounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: always show background image selector in presentation form

Previously the background section was hidden when no team backgrounds
existed. Now it always shows with a helpful message pointing team
owners to upload backgrounds in Team Settings > AI Tools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: stronger selected indicator on background image picker

Selected background now shows brand-colored border, checkmark badge,
full opacity image, and tinted glow. Unselected images are slightly
dimmed at 70% opacity. None button uses brand color tint when active.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add AI Presentation Builder as Feature 14 on landing page

Adds a new feature section showcasing the AI Presentation Builder with
a mockup displaying mini slide preview, color swatches, style preset
pills, and slide navigation dots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Changes listing-focused copy to webinar/lead-generation messaging per
user feedback. Mockup now shows "First-Time Buyer Workshop" with
slides/topics/CTA stats instead of listing details.

* fix: resolve Invalid JWT errors in presentation generator and edge functions

- getFreshToken() now supports forceRefresh param and widens refresh

  before showing "Session expired" message

  via getUser()
- Add localhost:5190 to DEV_ORIGINS in generate-presentation and
  ai-assistant edge functions
- Guard google-auth status check with session validation before invoke

Deleting presentations no longer frees up quota — the counter now
tracks total generations per month on the teams table:
- New columns: pres_generations_used, pres_generations_reset
- Backend increments counter after each successful generation

feat: implement JahFrames — full video-to-frames web app

Complete implementation of a free, browser-based video toolkit with
FFmpeg WASM. Includes video-to-frames extraction (FPS/count/scene/manual),
video compressor, GIF maker, and contact sheet generator. All processing
is 100% client-side with amber/gold brand theme, dark/light mode,
and responsive design.

Bug fixes applied during review:
- FFmpeg manager race condition and retry-after-failure
- -ss before -i for fast seek in frame extraction
- Dynamic file extensions for non-MP4 inputs
- Target-size compression using actual video duration
- Blob URL leak prevention across all stores and canvas utils
- Listener stacking prevention on FFmpeg singleton
- Timeline trimmer NaN guard and stale closure fix
- Frame comparison drag using window listeners
- Manual capture reading time from video ref directly
- Filter store reset on video clear

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(daemon): add knowledge maintenance task framework (#711)

## Summary

- Define `KnowledgeMaintenanceExecutor` bridge trait in daemon crate
with 7 operations: decay refresh, entity dedup, graph recompute,
embedding refresh, garbage collection, index maintenance, health check
- Replace `GraphMaintenance`/`MemoryConsolidation` stubs with 7 concrete
`BuiltinTask` variants scheduled at correct intervals (4h–daily)
- Add backpressure: skip execution cycle if previous run still in
progress
- Exempt `GraphHealthCheck` from 3-failure auto-disable threshold
- Stub implementation in binary crate (feature-gated on `recall`)
returns empty `MaintenanceReport`s — actual logic plugs in via F.1–F.8

## Schedule

| Task | Schedule | Timeout |
|------|----------|---------|
| DecayRefresh | Every 4 hours | 120s |
| EntityDedup | Every 6 hours | 60s |
| GraphRecompute | Every 8 hours | 180s |
| EmbeddingRefresh | Every 12 hours | 300s |
| KnowledgeGc | Daily 04:00 | 60s |
| IndexMaintenance | Daily 04:30 | 30s |
| GraphHealthCheck | Daily 05:00 | 60s |

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo check -p aletheia-oikonomos -p aletheia-mneme` passes
- [x] `cargo test -p aletheia-oikonomos` — 84 tests pass
- [x] `cargo clippy -p aletheia-oikonomos -p aletheia-taxis
--all-targets -- -D warnings` clean
- [x] `cargo check -p aletheia` (binary crate cross-crate wiring) passes
- [ ] Verify knowledge tasks register when `recall` feature +
`knowledge_maintenance_enabled` config are set

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
feat(sdk,server): use msgpack serialization for remote proving (#170)

## Summary
- **SDK**: Replace manual JSON serialization in the remote proving path
with `serializePrivateExecutionSteps()` (msgpack) — the same serializer
already used by the accelerated path. Encrypts raw msgpack bytes
directly instead of `JSON.stringify` → `Bytes.fromString` intermediate.
- **Server**: Replace `BBLazyPrivateKernelProver` TypeScript API with
direct `bb prove --scheme chonk --ivc_inputs_path` CLI invocation (same
approach as the accelerator). The server now passes decrypted msgpack
bytes straight to `bb` without JSON parsing or Zod validation.
- Removes unused `Bytes` and `PrivateExecutionStepSchema` imports from
both packages.

Closes #152

## Why CLI instead of the TypeScript prover API?

`serializePrivateExecutionSteps()` calls `serializeWitness()` (WASM) to
produce pre-serialized witness bytes in the msgpack. The TypeScript
prover API (`BBLazyPrivateKernelProver.createChonkProof`) expects
`WitnessMap` objects and calls `serializeWitness` again internally —
there's no `deserializeWitness` in Aztec to reverse this. Calling `bb`
directly with the msgpack avoids this mismatch entirely and is the same
proven approach the accelerator uses.

## Test plan
- [x] New test: remote mode calls `serializePrivateExecutionSteps` with
execution steps
- [x] Existing remote tests updated to mock the serializer (WASM panics
on fake witness data)
- [x] Server test verifies prover receives raw msgpack bytes (not parsed
JSON)
- [x] All 201 tests pass (`bun run test` — lint + typecheck + unit)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

feat: implement equation CAPTCHA mode with dynamic piece animation

- Add EquationParams interface and extend EquationChallenge with
  targetT and equationParams fields in captcha-engine.ts
- Implement equationEngine.generate() using mulberry32 for params and
  LCG for image/jigsaw/targetT selection; piece extracted upright with
  dynamic safe targetT range computed from quadratic clamp point
- Add dual notch: real shadow + random fake shadow (≥80px apart) baked
  into background to mislead bots
- Piece rotates via CSS transform as slider moves (theta from equation);
  only the shadow cutout bakes the target rotation angle
- Wire equationEngine in server.ts with mode-based routing and include
  equationParams in challenge response
- Frontend: add computeEquationPos() mirroring backend math, expose
  pieceX, pieceCurrentY, pieceTheta from useCaptcha hook
- Component applies live x, y, rotate(theta) to piece image
- Update README.md and add CLAUDE.md codebase guide

commit.message:
feat: doceval generates full-document pages from calcmark_source

Extend cmd/doceval with a second phase that converts .cm files into
evaluated Hugo pages. Pages with `calcmark_source: <path>` in their
frontmatter trigger generation of a sibling full.md containing the
complete CalcMark document with computed results inline.

Key changes:
- format.Options gains FrontmatterAsCodeFence to render CalcMark
  frontmatter as a ```yaml code fence instead of raw --- delimiters,
  avoiding collision with Hugo's own frontmatter parsing.
- doceval skips files containing the generated marker on re-runs.
- Generated pages use _build.list: never to stay out of section
  listings and sitemaps.
- Example page bundles use _index.md (branch bundles) so Hugo allows
  sub-pages; section.html updated to render branch bundles with no
  visible children identically to regular pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

## Summary

Eliminates all `unwrap()` calls from native mneme code
(`crates/mneme/src/` excluding `engine/`).

**Finding:** The library code was already clean — all ~759 `unwrap()`
calls were confined to `#[cfg(test)]` blocks. Each was replaced with
`.expect("descriptive message")` per project convention.

### Files changed (9 commits)

| File | Unwraps fixed | Notes |
|------|--------------|-------|
| `store.rs` | 175 | Test code only |
| `import.rs` | 99 | Test code only |
| `export.rs` | 83 | Test code only |
| `retention.rs` | 76 | Test code only |
| `backup.rs` | 73 | Test code only |
| `skill.rs` | 41 | Test code only |
| `knowledge_store.rs` | 39 | Test code only |
| `embedding.rs` | 39 | Test code only |
| `extract.rs` | 35 | Test code only |
| `knowledge.rs` | 34 | Test code only |
| `migration.rs` | 21 | Test code only |
| `portability.rs` | 12 | Test code only |
| `types.rs` | 10 | Test code only |
| `schema.rs` | 8 | Test code only |
| `query.rs` | 8 | Test code only |
| `query_rewrite.rs` | 3 | Test code only |
| `recall.rs` | 2 | Test code only |
| `hnsw_index.rs` | 1 | Test code only |
| `skills/extract.rs` | 8 | Test code only |

No new snafu error variants needed — library code was already using
proper `.context()` propagation throughout.

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo fmt --check -p aletheia-mneme` — clean
- [x] `cargo check -p aletheia-mneme` — clean
- [x] `cargo clippy -p aletheia-mneme --all-targets -- -D warnings` —
zero warnings
- [x] `cargo test -p aletheia-mneme` — 547 passed, 0 failed
- [x] Zero `unwrap()` in non-engine `crates/mneme/src/` (verified with
grep)

commit.message:
chore(mneme): CSR module cleanup — unsafe audit, tests, error handling (#706)

## Summary

- **Removed unsafe**: The single unsafe block in `Csr<()>::targets()` (a
`slice::from_raw_parts` cast from `Target<()>` to `u32`) is replaced
with a safe iterator: `.iter().map(|t| t.target)`. The
`#[expect(unsafe_code)]` suppression and `debug_assert_eq!` size check
are no longer needed and are removed.
- **`Default` for `CsrBuilder`**: Added `impl<EV> Default for
CsrBuilder<EV>` and delegated `new()` to it, fixing the
`clippy::new_without_default` lint.
- **Caller updates**: `out_neighbors` and `in_neighbors` now return
`impl Iterator<Item = u32> + '_` instead of `std::slice::Iter<'_, u32>`.
Updated four callers: `page_rank.rs`, `top_sort.rs`,
`strongly_connected_components.rs`, `triangles.rs`.
- **Tests**: Added `#[cfg(test)]` module in `csr/mod.rs` covering:
construction (empty, triangle, multi-edge), degree queries, out/in
neighbor iteration, weighted edge access, and PageRank on triangle and
star graphs.

## Validation

- `cargo check -p aletheia-mneme --features mneme-engine,storage-redb` ✓
- `cargo test -p aletheia-mneme` — 547 passed, 0 failed ✓
- `cargo clippy -p aletheia-mneme --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✓

## Test plan

- [ ] CI passes all checks
- [ ] Reviewer confirms unsafe is gone from `csr/` module
- [ ] New tests visible in
`crates/mneme/src/engine/fixed_rule/csr/mod.rs`

Hide always_on sections from right panel toggles

SECTIONS toggle list is misleading. They are now skipped in the loop.

commit.message:
txpool: penalize peers sending malformed p2p messages (#19781)

## Summary
- Penalize (kick/disconnect) peers that send malformed
transaction-related P2P messages instead of just logging the error at
Trace level
- Covers all message types in `handleInboundMessageWithTx`:
`TRANSACTIONS_66`, `POOLED_TRANSACTIONS_66`,
`NEW_POOLED_TRANSACTION_HASHES_66/68`, and `GET_POOLED_TRANSACTIONS_66`
- Introduces `errInternalDB` sentinel to distinguish local DB errors
(from `IdHashKnown`) from parse errors, so innocent peers are not
penalized for our internal failures

Closes erigontech/security#67

## Test plan
- [x] `TestPenalizePeerForMalformedMessages` — table-driven test
covering all 5 message types with invalid RLP, asserts `PenalizePeer`
called with `PenaltyKind_Kick`
- [x] `TestNoPenaltyOnInternalDBError` — sends valid transaction but
mocks `IdHashKnown` to return DB error, asserts peer is NOT penalized
and error is propagated
- [x] Existing tests pass (`go test -short ./txnprovider/txpool/...`)
- [x] `make lint` clean

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(mcp): improve external MCP server configuration and management (PUNT-213) (#405)

## Summary

- **Rich server details**: Extract token expiry info from OAuth
credentials and surface it in the API and UI
- **Status indicators**: Colored dots (green/red/gray) and badges show
each server's state (enabled, expired, disabled)
- **Token expiry warnings**: Banner alert when any OAuth tokens have
expired, with guidance on how to fix
- **Credential filtering**: Only pass enabled server OAuth tokens to
Claude CLI, ensuring disabled servers are truly blocked
- **Empty state**: Helpful instructions when no external MCP servers are
found in credentials
- **Counter badge**: Shows enabled/total count in section header

verify servers appear with status indicators

empty state message appears

green dot

Implement Leonardo webhook-based async flow to avoid Azure gateway timeout

Leonardo frame generation now uses start → webhook callback → client poll pattern
instead of synchronous upload+generate+poll+download. Removes Stability AI references
from CLAUDE.md. Adds LeonardoFrameStart, LeonardoWebhook, LeonardoFrameStatus endpoints.

commit.message:
feat: Add comprehensive partner manual invoice creation system

Major Features:
✅ Complete invoice creation page for partners
✅ Service selection from partner's catalog
✅ Real-time total calculation with tax and discounts
✅ PDF generation for manual invoices
✅ Professional UI with animated components

Invoice Creation Page includes:
- Customer information form (name, email, phone, address)
- Searchable service selector with partner's own services
- Dynamic quantity adjustment for each service
- Live subtotal, discount, tax (13% HST), and total calculation
- Payment terms and due date configuration
- Notes/terms section
- Create & Download PDF button
- Save as Draft option
- Professional summary sidebar

Service Selection Features:
- Modal with search functionality
- Shows all active partner services
- Real-time filtering
- Service details (price, description, category)
- Quantity controls (±0.25 increments)
- Line item totals
- Remove service option

Benefits to Partners:
1. Process walk-in customers independently
2. Handle phone orders immediately
3. Generate professional PDF invoices
4. Use custom pricing from their service catalog
5. Track all invoices in one dashboard
6. Send invoices via SMS
7. Better customer service
8. Increased business autonomy

Technical Implementation:
- Added PartnerCreateInvoice.jsx component
- Integrated with partner_invoices database table
- PDF generation via existing downloadInvoice utility
- Proper routing under /partner-portal/invoices/create
- Create Invoice button on invoices page
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion animations
- Form validation and error handling

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix Cloud Function pipeline to run end-to-end reliably

- sheets.py: Add SHEETS_DISABLED=1 bypass and reduce timeout 30s→10s;
  GCS is source of truth, Sheets writes are best-effort throughout
- sf_client.py: Remove duplicate/invalid SOQL fields (npe01__Primary_Address_Type__c,
  npe03__Number_of_Recurring_Donations__c) that caused query failures
- sf_sync/main.py: Reorder so GCS writes happen first, Sheets wrapped in try/except
- claude_analysis/main.py: Pass API key explicitly to Anthropic client,
  reduce batch sleep 45s→20s and cap at 60 donors/run to fit 300s deadline,
  increase max_tokens 4096→8192, wrap Sheets in try/except
- action_engine/main.py: Wrap Sheets writes in try/except
- deploy.sh: Set timeout 540s→3600s, add SHEETS_DISABLED=1 to env vars

Pipeline verified working: 5000 donors synced, 60 AI-analyzed, 4505 actions generated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add pcvs-server: Rust/axum backend for scan management

multipart upload, streaming download, bbox/date filtering.
